rules: No secrets, tokens, full account numbers, private family details, or raw chat dumps.
GitHub stores durable decisions and protocol; chat stores runtime coordination.
Use unknown instead of unverifiable status.
Every meaningful handoff records state, judgment, and next trigger.
Every Slack work thread must close as KEEP, KILL, PIVOT, WAIT, or PROMOTE.
Only promoted judgments move from Slack to Wiki, Skill, or Memory.
Er999 is Hermes-family but not a normal Er9-managed operating bot; it is a separate experiment lab node.
Mango is the retired former leader and now lives independently with Er999 on the separate laptop.

recent_decisions.result: External skills/harnesses now require risk class, owner, read-only verification, dry-run/spike, approval, and rollback path before adoption
dashboard-json is the current source of truth; public radar must avoid stale DRY-RUN/LIVE claims and record verification time
Public dashboard was live but stale since 2026-06-29; next improvement is automated safe-state mirror refresh

automation.loop: Every 30 minutes KST refresh source state and publish safe files to the public mirror.
triggers: OS crontab: MangoFamily Agent Radar refresh loop
Manual run after major Telegram or Slack operating-state changes
Manual run after Toss autotrader dashboard-json verification
